title: 4 Stocks To Watch In Today's Stock Market: Hostess, J.M. Smucker, Toro, Vertex
text: Hostess Brands, J.M. Smucker, Toro and Vertex Pharmaceuticals are stocks to watch, as the current stock market correction continues.

title: COTY Pulls Up Q1 View on Solid Demand for Beauty & Skin Care
text: COTY is seeing solid beauty demand in the near term, pushing management to raise its first-quarter fiscal 2023 view. It expects to double skincare revenues by fiscal 2025.
